measurement_note: Size is the input bit length. Exact geometric-series evaluation avoids the explicit exponent-length loop used by term-by-term summation; powers of two force every candidate exponent to be rejected before the N - 1 fallback.

cases.name: benchmark: reject all longer forms for a 12-bit value
benchmark: reject all longer forms for a 30-bit value
benchmark: reject all longer forms for a 60-bit value
